root.sql: select (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance < 300000 then 1 when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance between 300001 and 500000 then 2 when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance between 500001 and 700000 then 3 when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance between 700001 and 900000 then 4 when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance between 900001 and 1000000 then 5 when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 1000001 then 6 end ) as balance_range , (case when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 1 and 30 then 1 when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 31 and 40 then 2 when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 41 and 50 then 3 when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 51 and 60 then 4 when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 61 and 70 then 5 when trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no),0,3)) between 71 and 80 then 6 end ) as age_range , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sysdate from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' --and confirm_date = '30/05/2023' /*WHERE*/
